title: Cuneiform Tablet #0535: Hellenistic Court Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a court record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a court record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Court Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records court record matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
